# ShopZone

Discover Better. Shop Smarter. ShopZone is an AI-friendly, modern product discovery platform that aggregates, evaluates, and compares specs, deals, and prices from trusted online retailers.

## Metadata

- **Website**: https://shopzone.com
- **Sitemap**: https://shopzone.com/sitemap.xml
- **Robots**: https://shopzone.com/robots.txt
- **RSS Feed**: https://shopzone.com/rss.xml
- **Organization**: ShopZone
- **Industry**: E-Commerce, Product Discovery, Affiliate Marketing

---

## Core Navigation & Directories

For crawlers and retrieval agents (RAG), use the following endpoints:

- **Products Index**: https://shopzone.com/products
  *Full index of reviewed product catalog.*
- **Categories**: https://shopzone.com/categories
  *Groupings of products by domain (Electronics, Gaming, Fashion, etc.).*
- **Brands**: https://shopzone.com/brands
  *Product catalog sorted by manufacturers (Apple, Sony, Nike, Samsung, etc.).*
- **Top Deals**: https://shopzone.com/deals
  *Handpicked price drops, discounts, and verified coupons.*
- **Blog & News**: https://shopzone.com/blog
  *Editor articles, buying guides, and industry news.*
- **Product Reviews**: https://shopzone.com/reviews
  *Detailed editorial specs sheets, pros, and cons.*
- **Buying Guides**: https://shopzone.com/guides
  *Deep-dives helping consumers select the best product for specific use cases.*
- **Comparison Pages**: https://shopzone.com/compare
  *Side-by-side spec sheets and value comparisons.*

---

## Technical Support & Organization Resources

- **FAQ Page**: https://shopzone.com/faq
- **Support Portal**: https://shopzone.com/support
- **Contact Channels**: https://shopzone.com/contact
- **Privacy Policy**: https://shopzone.com/privacy
- **Terms of Service**: https://shopzone.com/terms

---

## API & Data Endpoints (Public REST)

- **Search Endpoint**: `https://shopzone.com/search?query={search_term}`
  *Accepts keywords, categories, or filters for real-time querying.*
- **Categories JSON**: `https://shopzone.com/api/categories`
  *Returns active categories with names and slugs.*
- **Products API**: `https://shopzone.com/api/products`
  *Provides pagination and search triggers for database products.*
